thumb-color.$description: Material 3 color used by the scroller component for the indicator thumb: M3 publishes no scrollbar guidance (defers to platform scrollbars), so the theme-author decision maps the thumb to md.sys.color.outline-variant (ki.outline.med-em, divider/tabs precedent).

thumb-thickness.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the scroller component for the thumb cross size: 8dp flush thumb, the platform-scrollbar look M3 defers to (theme-author decision, no md.comp.scrollbar tokens exist).

thumb-radius.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the scroller component for the thumb shape: square-ended like the platform scrollbars M3 defers to (divider end-cap precedent).

gutter.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the scroller component for the thumb clearance: zero — the 8dp thumb fills the rail flush, platform style (rail = thumb-thickness + 2×gutter).

track-inset.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the scroller component for the rail end insets: zero — platform scrollbars run edge to edge (theme-author decision).
